description: Question concept dimension (reusable concept bank) - one row per question concept, with current question text and type. Generated from the data dictionary / CIDTool.

fields.name: question_type
fields.description: Answer type from the dictionary (e.g. Single, Multiple, Num, Text)

fields.name: secondary_source_concept_id
fields.description: FK to secondary_source (one representative placement; see AGENTS.md caveat)

fields.name: source_question_concept_id
fields.description: FK to source_question; NULL if standalone question
